summary: The video shows a vehicle driving down a two-lane road with moderate traffic. A large truck is traveling ahead in the same lane as the recording vehicle. To the right, there is a parked truck partially obstructing the view. Trees line the roadside, and buildings are visible on both sides.

events_timeline.event: A large truck travels ahead in the same lane as the recording vehicle.

uncertainties: The identity of the parked truck on the right side of the road is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There are no apparent collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between vehicles.
